name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 19 Oct 2023
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release includes eCommerce releases"},{"text":" 6.267.0","bold":true},{"text":", "},{"text":"6.268.0","bold":true},{"text":", "},{"text":"6.269.0","bold":true},{"text":", "},{"text":"6.270.0","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Enhancements","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Enhanced Security at Checkout","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To mitigate the risk of card testing attacks, we have strengthened our bot detection rules on Checkout. Visitors who are deemed likely to be bots will be presented with a Captcha upon accessing the Cart or Checkout page."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" ","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"New Parameters for AddOrder API","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"A new parameter called "},{"text":"Extra Options","bold":true},{"text":" is introduced in "},{"text":"AddOrder","bold":true},{"text":" and "},{"text":"CreateOrder","bold":true},{"text":" APIs. The parameter accepts a list of objects consisting of name-value pairs and enables you to include additional personalized details for the orders."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For more information, refer to "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fdevelopers.maropost.com%2Fdocumentation%2Fengineers%2Fapi-documentation%2Forders-invoices%2Faddorder","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"AddOrder API","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"  ","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Custom Configuration for Automatically Synching eBay Data","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We introduced a new advanced configuration that automatically re-synchs the eBAY orders and transactions from the last 24 to 72 hours, once per day - overnight. The purpose of this feature is to catch any order that may have failed to sync to Neto as part of the normal order sync process that takes place throughout the day."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"By default, the process checks for and imports any missing orders and transactions for the last 24 hours. You can edit the configuration to change the time interval to any value between 0 to 72 hours."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Config.0685g00000HgwRwAAJ.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Config.0685g00000HgwRwAAJ.png","name":"Config","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1000,"width":1600}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Changed Default Settings for PayPal Pay in 4","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The PayPal Pay in 4 feature is by default enabled in PayPal configuration, that is, on the Edit Payment Method page. You can update this option as per your requirements."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Payin4.0685g00000HgwG5AAJ.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Payin4.0685g00000HgwG5AAJ.png","name":"Payin4","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":728,"width":1600}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with the"},{"text":" UpdateContent","bold":true},{"text":" API where it was excluding SEO details if not included in the method body."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in which the Due date on Stock Journal was incorrectly showing the invoice date instead of the dispatched date, where the “Export transaction date for invoices\" setting in the Xero integration was set to \"Date Completed\"."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where the order ID was not included in the Allied Express manifest file."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where the “This is a theme preview” banner was visible for the live theme on mobile devices."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where the \"This is a theme preview” banner was causing incorrect styling when previewing certain themes."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" ","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
